description: You are a Content Marketing Manager at an online bookstore. Use Screaming Frog SEO Spider to identify book descriptions on 'https://books.toscrape.com/' that are difficult to read based on Flesch Reading Ease metrics. Export the full Content analysis data to '~/Documents/SEO/exports/readability_audit.csv' and save a report containing the URL with the lowest Flesch Reading Ease score to '~/Documents/SEO/reports/hardest_to_read.txt'.
